PowerMac Original Flavor Mac & Cheese Macaroni and Cheese Dinner

Description

Enjoy the same great taste of Kraft Macaroni and Cheese that you love, now with more protein in every bite. Kraft PowerMac is everything you love...

Serving size: 2.8 oz (80g) (Makes about 1 cup)
content_text: KRAFT MAC AND CHEESE PowerMac Original Flavor Mac & Cheese Macaroni and Cheese Dinner Sizes available: 3.6 lb Buy Online Description Enjoy the same great taste of Kraft Macaroni and Cheese that you love, now with more protein in every bite. Kraft PowerMac is everything you love... Serving size: 2.8 oz (80g) (Makes about 1 cup)
summary: Apple stopped selling the Power Mac G5 (with space) in August 2006, so I’m not sure how much they care about Kraft using “PowerMac” (sans space) as a trademark for protein-enhanced macaroni and cheese. (I feel like there’s got to be a joke to be made here about a “cheese grater”...) ★
title: The New PowerMac
